title: War in Iran Is Making the Hajj, the Muslim Pilgrimage, More Expensive
summary_full: Soaring jet fuel prices stemming from the war, the government of India said, have forced it to hike hajj package prices for its citizens.
summary_public: Soaring jet fuel prices stemming from the war, the government of India said, have forced it to hike hajj package prices for its citizens.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: War in Iran Is Making the Hajj
